video.view.empty: No video has been added yet.
video.view.cover_unavailable: The video cover is temporarily unavailable.
video.editor.hero.title: Video Base Card
video.editor.hero.desc: Uploading a video automatically captures its first frame as the default cover. A manually uploaded cover always takes priority in view mode.
video.editor.preview.title: Card Preview
video.editor.preview.desc: View mode prefers the saved cover resource. When no cover exists, it falls back to the first frame of the video.
video.editor.preview.empty: Upload a video to preview its cover here.
video.editor.resources.title: Resources
video.editor.resources.desc: Resources are stored in the card root. This compact form layout keeps the editor calmer and easier to scan in a narrow panel.
video.editor.resources.video_note: Upload the final video asset here. Replacing the video also regenerates the default cover.
video.editor.resources.video_hint: Uploading imports it into the card root and tries to capture the first frame as the default cover.
video.editor.resources.cover_note: When no separate cover exists, view mode falls back to the first frame of the video.
video.editor.resources.cover_hint: You can also upload a dedicated cover image, which always takes priority in view mode.
video.editor.meta.title: Details
video.editor.meta.desc: These fields are optional. They only appear in view mode when you fill them in.
video.editor.fields.creator: Creator
video.editor.fields.publish_time_hint: Using a consistent date format helps future presentation.
video.editor.placeholders.creator: Example: Chips Studio
video.editor.errors.import_unavailable: The current host does not provide resource import support.
video.editor.errors.cover_import_failed: Failed to import the cover image.
video.editor.errors.cover_generate_faile: Failed to generate the default cover.
